title: Mazhaithuli Azhaga Lyrics Om Shanthi Om Song Lyrics
singerName: Aalap Raju, Devan Ekambaram, Dr Burn
stanzas:
Mazhaithuli Azhaga Ival Azhaga Lyrics Om Shanthi Om
Singer(s): Aalaap Raju, Devan, Dr.Burn
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

Oru vatta nila
pol aval azhagu
vaal natchathiram
pol aval sirippu

Ennulle ennulle sendraale
vendaam ini vendaam vilagaadhey

Mazhaithuli azhagaa ival azhagaa
manasukull kelvi ondru kettaen
Ival manam pol
mazhathuli eeeram illai.

Manjal veyil azhagaa ival azhagaa
vizhigalil kelvi ondru kettaen
ival mugam pol
veyil adhu jolikka villai.

Idho nenjai alli
pogindraal
adho konjam thalli
pogindraal
adho kenja vaithu
pogindraal, nanbaa

Ival yaaro enna paero
arindhidum aaval thindaada.
oru paarvai ival paarththaal
uyir anu yaavum kondaada.

Ival siriththaal pookkal malarum
ival nadandhaal boomi suzhalum
ival azhagil idhayam kiliyum
nanbaa....

Idho nenjai alli
pogindraal
adho konjam thalli
pogindraal
adho kenja vaithu
pogindraal, nanbaa

Un uchchithanai nugarndha
pachchai kuzhandhayin vaasam
adhu vendum idhu vendum
pidivaadham konjam konjam
adhigaaram
dhevadhaikku alangaaram
oru nodi paarvai pattaal
adhu podhum
..
ennaavil padhaartham
udayaida nalinam
pudhuraga paravasam.

Thottu chellum ennai
vittu chellaaadhey vendaam
kattikol ennai nithttham
unvaasam enmael veesum.

Alai alaiiyaai kaattril aadi
koondhalin nilaigal kothtthaada.
aannmanadhin thimirai ellaam
asaivugalaale pandhaada

Ival vizhigal minnal thugalo
ival nizhalum azhagin nagalo
ini dhinamum ivalin kanavo
nanbaaa

Idho nenjai alli
pogindraal
adho konjam thalli
pogindraal
adho kenja vaithu
pogindraal, nanbaa

Mazhaithuli azhagaa ival azhagaa
manasukull kelvi ondru kettaen
Ival manam pol
mazhathuli eeeram illai.

Manjal veyil azhagaa ival azhagaa
vizhigalil kelvi ondru kettaen
ival mugam pol
veyil adhu jolikka villai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Mazhaithuli Azhaga expresses deep romantic feelings and admiration, portraying the beauty of love.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Om Shanthi Om, this song captures a pivotal moment of romance, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Aalap Raju and Devan Ekambaram, with music composed by Vijay Ebenezer.

When was the song released?

Mazhaithuli Azhaga was released on November 8, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mazhaithuli Azhaga, the singers Aalap Raju and Devan Ekambaram deliver a heartfelt performance that resonates with the theme of love and admiration. The song's lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of longing and beauty, perfectly complementing the romantic visuals in Om Shanthi Om. The soothing melody composed by Vijay Ebenezer enhances the emotional experience, making it a memorable track for any romantic occasion. Overall, the song beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mazhaithuli Azhaga from Om Shanthi Om is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing. With the enchanting voices of Aalap Raju and Devan Ekambaram, paired with Dr Burn's unique flair, this song creates an unforgettable auditory experience. The lyrical brilliance of Na Muthukumar combined with Vijay Ebenezer's melodic composition makes this track a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: She is beautiful like a round moon, her smile is like a shining star.
Inside me, I don't want to let go anymore, don't separate from me.
She is beautiful like raindrops, I have heard a question in my heart. Her heart is like rain, it doesn't have any heaviness.
She is beautiful like the golden sun, I have heard a question in her eyes. Her face doesn't shine like the sun.
If the heart goes away, it might get pushed away a little, or it might get caught, my friend.
Who is she? Everyone knows her, she doesn't eat. If she looks at you, life will dance.
If she smiles, flowers will bloom, if she walks, the earth will spin, her beauty is like a bird's heart, my friend....
If the heart goes away, it might get pushed away a little, or it might get caught, my friend.
She is beautiful like raindrops, I have heard a question in my heart. Her heart is like rain, it doesn't have any heaviness.
She is beautiful like the golden sun, I have heard a question in her eyes. Her face doesn't shine like the sun.
